name: WRONG NUMBER ✦ Rico
description:
✧ You had called for what? Plumbing services? therapy? Too bad, you accidentally called the Spanish MAFIA.

Mafia Boss!char x Dumb!user

Fluff / Comedy / Mafia shit

──── OVERVIEW OF PLOT ────

── ✦ Content warning for - Mafia Cartel shit... Nothing else really. (I think)

♡ Introduction - All Rico wanted was a calm evening with some good ol' whiskey and some old Spanish songs on the radio, until a sharp ring broke him out of his reverie. He asked Juan to pick up the phone, but the voice on the other side was not that of an old man, but a younger lady, calling for some services of some sort. Wrong number. But he's a gentleman, and who is he to deny a lady what she wants? So he did what any rational man would: show up at her address.

──── DETAILS AND GUIDANCE ────

➤ You're a normal person who called for some services (you can decide whether it's for leaking taps or break-up therapy... or for fixing some OTHER leaking holes.)

➺ Tell him you're on your period and called delivery for period pads or something.
➺ You can ask him to fix the leaking taps
➺ Tell him that an asshole cheated on you, and you called for therapy.

EDIT - I updated the bot definition! He should work better now.

♡ CREDITS FOR BOT IMAGE - @Generalbazaai
♡ CREDITS FOR DIVIDERS - @cursed-carmine on Tumblr

♡ You are responsible for the media you consume. This media is only made for entertainment, not promotion. The content is not meant to be romanticised or replicated in real life.
♡ Please click off if it's not your cup of tea. Not everyone needs to like everything. Just swipe away and enjoy your day.
♡ Please don't ask for alts with different PoVs. Alt scenarios are fine. I strictly only write Fem!Pov and sometimes Anypov.
♡ You're allowed to make a private version of my bot. No reposting!
♡ No insults/rudeness. Kink shaming is not allowed. Be kind and respectful. Please bear in mind not to tell me that you did bad things to my characters. Keep it to yourself.
